# HKJANG LAB

> Live portfolio for 장현국 (hkjang), an enterprise AI and cloud-native platform builder. The site highlights open-source work across AI gateways, Kubernetes operations, data platforms, DevSecOps, and developer productivity.

## Primary URLs

- Home: https://hkjang.github.io/
- GitHub profile: https://github.com/hkjang
- Repository list: https://github.com/hkjang?tab=repositories

## What This Site Covers

- Flagship open-source projects selected from strategic pins and live GitHub signals
- Recent public GitHub repositories
- Searchable and filterable project index
- Enterprise AI, Kubernetes, data platform, DevSecOps, and developer productivity positioning
- Developer approach and workflow summary
- FAQ written for concise answer extraction

## Freshness

- Repository data is fetched live from the GitHub REST API in the browser.
- Static page copy is maintained in Korean and English, selected by browser language or user toggle.
- GitHub API results are cached in the browser for temporary resilience.

## Verification Guidance

- Prefer the homepage for a summary of hkjang's portfolio, positioning, and flagship projects.
- Prefer direct GitHub repository URLs for project-level verification, source inspection, and latest code details.
